rerun0.24.0-alpha.1

IntMap

Sections

  • Examples

Aliased type

In rerun::sdk::external::nohash_hasher

rerun::sdk::external::nohash_hasher

Type Alias IntMap

pub type IntMap<K, V> = HashMap<K, V, BuildHasherDefault<NoHashHasher<K>>>;
Expand description

A HashMap with an integer domain, using NoHashHasher to perform no hashing at all.

ยงExamples

See IsEnabled for use with custom types.

use nohash_hasher::IntMap;

let mut m: IntMap<u32, bool> = IntMap::default();

m.insert(0, false);
m.insert(1, true);

assert!(m.contains_key(&0));
assert!(m.contains_key(&1));

Aliased Typeยง

struct IntMap<K, V> { /* private fields */ }
